notes: AI interview for product thinking assessment

strengths: Strong understanding of React and Node.js fundamentals
Good problem-solving approach with structured thinking
Confident in discussing past projects and technical decisions
weaknesses: Limited knowledge of advanced TypeScript features
Could improve understanding of security best practices

keyInsights: Candidate showed strong enthusiasm for the role
Good cultural fit based on communication style
Ready to take on leadership responsibilities
Open to learning and adapting to new technologies
report.recommendationReason: Strong technical foundation with good communication skills. Candidate demonstrates readiness for senior role with some areas for growth.
suggestedNextSteps: Schedule technical round with team lead
Assess TypeScript skills with coding exercise

transcript.speaker: AI
transcript.message: Hello Arjun! Welcome to the interview. Let's start with you telling me about your experience with React and Node.js.

transcript.speaker: Candidate
transcript.message: Thank you! I've been working with React for about 5 years now. I've built several large-scale applications using React with hooks, context API, and Redux for state management. On the Node.js side, I've developed RESTful APIs and worked extensively with Express.js...

notes: Technical round - focus on system design
